description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository/ and the fragment cache at target/fragment-cache/, defines the stages build_and_test and package, and sets MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables for Maven. In the build_and_test stage add a test job using the maven:3-openjdk-17 image that runs the exact command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS clean compile test" and stores artifacts named test with the paths target/site/jacoco/ and target/fragment-cache/. In the package stage add a doxygen job using the alpine image that runs only on the master branch, executes "apk update && apk add doxygen graphviz ttf-freefont", then "pwd", "ls -l", "mkdir -p target", "mkdir target/doxygen", "doxygen src/main/doxygen/doxygen.conf", and "mv target/doxygen/html/ public/", and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Also in the package stage add a release job using the maven:3-openjdk-17 image that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -e package -DskipTests", then "mkdir target/release", "ls target", "tar -C target/release -xzvf target/kickc-release.tgz", "mv target/release/kickc/jar/kickc-release.jar target/release/kickc/jar/kickc-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.jar", "mkdir ./kickc", "mv target/release/kickc/* ./kickc/", and "touch ./kickc/fragment/cache/*", and publishes artifacts named kickc_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} with the listed paths under ./kickc and the LICENSE, NOTICE, and PDF files.
